title: 6D ATS-1R Apex TC-2
description: Carbon road race helmet with ODS technology for multi-directional impact.

yoast_metadesc: Unlock peak protection with the 6D ATS-1R Apex TC-2, engineered for intermediate oval heads using advanced composite shells and dual-density liners. Experience unmatched comfort and impact resistance today. Compare prices and specs at Helmetsan!
